name: Mother-32
description: Semi-modular analog mono synth voice. VCO with saw/pulse, 24dB Moog ladder filter switchable LP/HP, EG, VCA, LFO, 32-step sequencer, VC mixer and 32-point patchbay in 60HP.

controls.name: FREQUENCY
controls.description: Coarse tune of the VCO around its center position.
controls.detail: ±1 octave (analog · slightly wider at extremes)

controls.name: VCO WAVE
controls.description: Switch selects which VCO waveform is routed to the panel MIX knob.
controls.detail: PULSE · SAW · both available simultaneously at VCO SAW / VCO PULSE jacks

controls.name: PULSE WIDTH
controls.description: Duty cycle of the pulse wave. Noon = square.
controls.detail: ~2% (CCW) to ~98% (CW) · 50% at noon

controls.name: GLIDE
controls.description: Portamento time between keyboard, sequencer or MIDI notes.
controls.detail: Applies to KB CV · responds to CC 5 / CC 65

controls.name: VCO MOD SOURCE
controls.description: Selects modulation source routed to VCO MOD AMOUNT.
controls.detail: UP: EG or external VCO MOD jack · DOWN: LFO

controls.name: VCO MOD AMOUNT
controls.description: Depth of modulation applied to selected VCO destination.
controls.detail: Acts as attenuator for VCO MOD jack when patched

controls.name: VCO MOD DEST
controls.description: Routes modulation to pulse width or oscillator frequency.
controls.detail: UP: PULSE WIDTH · DOWN: FREQUENCY

controls.name: MIX
controls.description: Blends VCO waveform (CCW) with NOISE or external audio (CW).
controls.detail: CCW: VCO · CW: NOISE/EXT · NOISE normalized to EXT AUDIO · VC via MIX CV

controls.name: CUTOFF
controls.description: Filter cutoff frequency for both LP and HP modes.
controls.detail: 20Hz – 20kHz

controls.name: RESONANCE
controls.description: Feedback amount. Self-oscillates past ~3 o'clock in LP mode.
controls.detail: LP: resonant peak · HP: disables normal operation when raised

controls.name: VCF MODE
controls.description: Switches ladder filter topology.
controls.detail: UP: HI PASS (24dB/oct, non-resonant) · DOWN: LOW PASS (24dB/oct, resonant)

controls.name: VCF MOD SOURCE
controls.description: Selects EG or LFO as filter modulation source.
controls.detail: UP: EG · DOWN: LFO

controls.name: VCF MOD AMOUNT
controls.description: Depth of modulation applied to CUTOFF.
controls.detail: Sums with CUTOFF knob and VCF CUTOFF jack

controls.name: VCF MOD POLARITY
controls.description: Inverts EG or LFO effect on cutoff.
controls.detail: UP: + · DOWN: −

controls.name: LFO RATE
controls.description: Speed of the LFO. Reaches audio rate.
controls.detail: ~0.1Hz – 350Hz panel · up to ~600Hz with CV

controls.name: LFO WAVE
controls.description: Shape routed to VCO MOD SOURCE and VCF MOD SOURCE switches.
controls.detail: UP: SQUARE · DOWN: TRIANGLE · both available at LFO TRI / LFO SQ jacks

controls.name: ATTACK
controls.description: Ramp-up time of the envelope generator.
controls.detail: Triggered by GATE / sequencer / MIDI Note On

controls.name: DECAY
controls.description: Ramp-down time after attack or gate-off.
controls.detail: Fast: pluck · slow: swell

controls.name: SUSTAIN
controls.description: Two-position sustain switch (no level knob).
controls.detail: ON: AHR behavior · OFF: AD behavior (retriggers every note)

controls.name: VCA MODE
controls.description: Selects VCA control source.
controls.detail: ON: drone · EG: envelope-controlled

controls.name: VOLUME
controls.description: Master attenuator for AUDIO OUT (rear) and VCA patch jack.
controls.detail: Affects headphone output and VCA out simultaneously

controls.name: TEMPO / GATE LENGTH
controls.description: Dual-purpose: sets sequencer tempo when running · sets per-step gate length while editing.
controls.detail: 20–300 BPM internal · SHIFT + knob = Swing Amount · gate 1/8 to 8/8 (tie) per step

controls.name: VC MIX
controls.description: Patchable DC-coupled CV/audio mixer. Blends MIX 1 (CCW) and MIX 2 (CW).
controls.detail: MIX 1 normalized to 0V · MIX 2 normalized to +5V · useful as attenuator, VCA or fixed-voltage source

controls.name: HOLD / REST
controls.description: Repeats current step while held (playback) · toggles rest (editing).
controls.detail: Live-Mute via SHIFT + REST

controls.name: RESET / ACCENT
controls.description: Returns pattern to step 1 (playback) · toggles accent on selected step (editing).
controls.detail: Accent boosts VCF cutoff and VCA level internally

controls.name: PATTERN (BANK)
controls.description: Pattern select. With SHIFT selects bank.
controls.detail: 8 banks × 8 patterns = 64 locations

controls.name: RUN/STOP (REC)
controls.description: Starts/stops sequencer. SHIFT + REC arms record in KB mode.
controls.detail: SHIFT + hold >1s: initiates save

controls.name: (SHIFT)
controls.description: Modifier for secondary functions across the panel.
controls.detail: Live Accent / Live Mute / Live Ratchet / page & mode selection

controls.name: (KB) / (STEP) arrows
controls.description: Octave select in KB mode · step rotate in Step mode.
controls.detail: SHIFT + KB: KB mode · SHIFT + STEP: Step mode · hold during TEMPO/GLIDE turn for clock-division / swing-interval

controls.description: Pattern page selectors (up to 32 steps).
controls.detail: SHIFT + SET END: defines end step

controls.name: Step 1-8 buttons
controls.description: Step on/off in Step mode · keyboard notes + step select in KB mode.
controls.detail: 13-note keyboard spans C–C across pages

inputs.name: EXT. AUDIO
inputs.description: External audio into the mixer. Replaces noise when patched.

inputs.name: MIX CV
inputs.description: Crossfade control between VCO and NOISE/EXT.

inputs.name: VCA CV
inputs.description: Direct CV into output VCA. Sums with EG/ON switch.

inputs.name: VCF CUTOFF
inputs.description: CV sums with CUTOFF knob and VCF MOD AMOUNT.

inputs.name: VCO 1V/OCT
inputs.description: Exponential pitch input. Sums with KB CV and FREQUENCY knob.

inputs.name: VCO LIN FM
inputs.description: Linear FM input for harmonically rich audio-rate modulation.

inputs.name: VCO MOD
inputs.description: External modulation source replacing EG on VCO MOD SOURCE UP position.

inputs.name: LFO RATE
inputs.description: CV input for LFO rate. Extends LFO to audio rates.

inputs.name: MIX 1
inputs.description: Input A of VC Mixer. DC-coupled.

inputs.name: MIX 2
inputs.description: Input B of VC Mixer. DC-coupled.

inputs.name: VC MIX CTRL
inputs.description: CV for crossfade between MIX 1 and MIX 2.

inputs.name: MULT
inputs.voltage: Eurorack level · CV-splitter only (do not sum)

inputs.name: GATE
inputs.description: External gate triggers EG and sets VCA.

inputs.name: TEMPO
inputs.description: Configurable: CV tempo, single-clock advance (default), analog clock (PPQN), or step-address CV.

inputs.name: RUN/STOP
inputs.description: Gate-on runs sequencer, gate-off stops it.

inputs.name: RESET
inputs.description: Gate returns pattern to step 1 and holds there while high.

inputs.name: HOLD
inputs.description: Gate pauses advance, repeating current step.

outputs.name: VCA
outputs.description: Post-VCA audio output. Responds to VOLUME knob.

outputs.name: NOISE
outputs.description: White noise source. Normalized to MIX CW position.

outputs.name: VCO SAW
outputs.description: Sawtooth waveform direct from VCO, independent of VCO WAVE switch.

outputs.name: VCO PULSE
outputs.description: Pulse waveform direct from VCO, independent of VCO WAVE switch.

outputs.name: LFO TRI
outputs.description: Triangle LFO output, always available regardless of LFO WAVE switch.

outputs.name: LFO SQ
outputs.description: Square LFO output, always available regardless of LFO WAVE switch.

outputs.name: ASSIGN
outputs.description: Configurable output. Default is sequencer clock.

outputs.name: KB
outputs.description: 1V/oct pitch CV from keyboard, sequencer or MIDI. Includes pitch-bend.

outputs.name: GATE
outputs.description: Gate signal from keyboard, sequencer or MIDI Note On.

behaviors.name: Semi-modular normalization
behaviors.description: Internal signal flow plays a complete voice with no cables: VCO → MIX → VCF → VCA → AUDIO OUT, with EG on VCF and VCA, and the sequencer driving KB CV / GATE internally. Patching any input overrides its normalization.

behaviors.name: Assignable output
behaviors.description: ASSIGN jack re-routes to one of 16 sources: Accent, Clock, Clock/2, Clock/4, Step Ramp/Saw/Triangle/Random, Step 1 trigger, MIDI Velocity, Channel Pressure, Pitch Bend, CC 1/2/4/7. Clock is the default and is the recommended signal for syncing a DFAM.

behaviors.name: TEMPO input modes
behaviors.description: TEMPO jack has four modes: Tempo CV, Single-Clock-Advance (default — one pulse per step), Analog Clock at programmable PPQN, and Step-Address CV (dividing the CV range into slices that select individual steps directly). Step-Address turns the jack into a wavetable-style step scanner.

behaviors.name: Per-step articulation
behaviors.description: Each sequencer step stores note, Gate Length (1/8–8/8, max = tie to next step), Glide on/off, Ratchet count (1–4 subdivisions), Accent and Rest independently. SUSTAIN must be ON for gate-length variation to be audible.

behaviors.name: Swing interval decoupling
behaviors.description: Unlike most analog sequencers, swing interval is set independently of step rate (8 dotted / 8 triplet / 8 straight divisions). Allows eighth-note steps to be swung on a triplet grid, producing polyrhythmic feels. Swing amount and interval are stored per pattern.

behaviors.name: Live performance overrides
behaviors.trigger: SHIFT + RESET / HOLD / GLIDE / KB or STEP arrows
behaviors.description: SHIFT + ACCENT = Live Accent on every step · SHIFT + REST = Live Mute · SHIFT + GLIDE = Live Ratchet (1–4) · arrow buttons + keyboard = Live Transpose by octave + note. None of these overrides are stored — they vanish when buttons release.

behaviors.name: Accent signal routing
behaviors.trigger: Accent stored on step or Live Accent active
behaviors.description: Internal accent hard-wired to boost both VCF cutoff and VCA level at fixed amount. Setup page 8 option 4 disables internal accent when ASSIGN is set to Accent — use this to re-route accent to external destinations via the ASSIGN jack.

behaviors.name: VCO self-oscillation trick
behaviors.trigger: LP mode · RES / MIX max · KB → VCF CUTOFF · dead cable in EXT. AUDIO
behaviors.description: With MIX and RESONANCE at max in LP mode, the ladder filter becomes a clean sine oscillator. Patching KB into VCF CUTOFF tracks it 1V/oct. Plugging an unconnected cable into EXT. AUDIO breaks noise normalization, giving the pure sine. Adds a second voice to the module.

behaviors.name: HP resonance workaround
behaviors.trigger: HP mode · VCF out → EXT. AUDIO
behaviors.description: HP mode has no resonance because RESONANCE fails above zero. Patching VCF output back to EXT. AUDIO repurposes MIX as a feedback control for HP resonance, up to self-oscillation. Keep panel RESONANCE fully CCW.

behaviors.name: MIDI to CV conversion
behaviors.description: KB CV output follows MIDI Note On. MIDI Note 0 = −5V, 120 = +5V. Pitch bend (±1 octave default, up to ±12 semitones via RPN) adds to KB. Velocity ≥96 sets Accent on recorded steps. CC5 = portamento time, CC65 = portamento on/off, CC64 = sustain.

behaviors.name: Clock priority
behaviors.description: Internal clock is overridden by MIDI clock, which is overridden by an analog clock at the TEMPO input. Setup page 8 options 1–2 disable Follow MIDI Clock / Follow MIDI Start/Stop when preferred.

behaviors.name: VC Mixer as utility
behaviors.description: DC-coupled and fully independent from the synth voice. With nothing patched, VC MIX knob outputs 0 to +5V as a manual voltage source. Patching one input makes it an attenuator; patching both turns the VC MIX CTRL jack into a crossfader. Works for audio as well as CV.

patchIdeas.name: Mother-32 + DFAM classic sync
patchIdeas.patch: Mother-32 melody locked to DFAM drums · Setup page 1 value 2 (Clock default) · ASSIGN at Mother = 16th-note clock · patch Mother ASSIGN → DFAM ADV/CLOCK · start DFAM then Mother · both advance in lockstep · experiment with Clock/2 or Clock/4 divisions for polyrhythms
patchIdeas.diagram:
Mother-32:
* Sequencer: running
* ASSIGN: Clock (Setup p1 v2)

DFAM:
* RUN/STOP armed before Mother starts

- Mother-32 (ASSIGN) c> DFAM (ADV/CLOCK)

patchIdeas.name: Cross-modulate DFAM with Mother pitch
patchIdeas.patch: Mother sequences melody · patch KB → DFAM VCO 1 CV for pitched drums that follow the bass line · DFAM VCO 2 can further FM with 1→2 FM AMT · creates tonal-percussion hybrid
patchIdeas.diagram:
Mother-32:
* Sequencer: melodic pattern

DFAM:
* SEQ PITCH MOD: OFF (VCO 1 tracks Mother)

- Mother-32 (KB) p> DFAM (VCO 1 CV)
- Mother-32 (ASSIGN) c> DFAM (ADV/CLOCK) // shared clock

patchIdeas.name: Filter as secondary oscillator
patchIdeas.patch: LP mode · MIX and RESONANCE full CW · patch cable into EXT. AUDIO with nothing at the other end (kills noise normalization) · patch KB → VCF CUTOFF for 1V/oct tracking · filter self-oscillates as pure sine · VCF OUT drives VCA · stacks as a sub-oscillator under the sawtooth voice
patchIdeas.diagram:
Mother-32:
* VCF MODE: LOW PASS
* MIX: full CW
* RESONANCE: full CW
* Dead cable in EXT. AUDIO

- Mother-32 (KB) p> Mother-32 (VCF CUTOFF) // sine tracks 1V/oct
- Mother-32 (VCF) -> Mother-32 (EXT. AUDIO) // not required, see below

patchIdeas.name: HP resonance via feedback
patchIdeas.patch: HP mode · panel RESONANCE fully CCW · patch VCF → EXT. AUDIO · MIX knob now controls HP feedback/resonance · push to self-oscillation for whistle tones above the signal · recovers a feature the panel withholds
patchIdeas.diagram:
Mother-32:
* VCF MODE: HI PASS
* RESONANCE: fully CCW
* MIX: ~2 o'clock

- Mother-32 (VCF) -> Mother-32 (EXT. AUDIO) // feedback enables HP resonance

patchIdeas.name: Step-address scanner
patchIdeas.patch: Setup page 3 value 4 (TEMPO = Step Address CV) · sequencer no longer clocked · patch slow LFO → TEMPO · voltage selects sequencer step directly · smoother LFOs smear through steps · ramp LFO plays sequence like a tape · wild with VCO MOD from the same LFO
patchIdeas.diagram:
Mother-32:
* Setup p3 v4: TEMPO = Step Address CV
* Pattern: 8 stored pitches

- LFO (Out) >> Mother-32 (TEMPO) // CV voltage selects step

patchIdeas.name: Ratcheting acid line
patchIdeas.patch: Program 8 steps · SHIFT + GLIDE on steps 3 and 7 to set ratchet = 4 · glide ON between steps · GLIDE knob ~9 o'clock · Decay short · VCF MOD SOURCE = EG · VCF MOD AMOUNT 3 o'clock · classic 303-style roll with slides and bursts
patchIdeas.diagram:
Mother-32:
* Pattern: 8 steps with ratchet=4 on steps 3 & 7
* GLIDE: ~9 o'clock
* SUSTAIN: ON
* VCF MOD SRC: EG · AMT: 3 o'clock

- Mother-32 (VCA) -> Output (In) // internal voice

patchIdeas.name: Ping-filter drum voice
patchIdeas.patch: VCA MODE: ON · VCF MOD SOURCE: EG · VCF MOD AMOUNT 3 o'clock · RESONANCE ~3 o'clock · short Decay · feed ASSIGN (Clock) → GATE · filter pings with every clock pulse · detune with CUTOFF for tom/kick flavors
patchIdeas.diagram:
Mother-32:
* VCA MODE: ON
* VCF MOD SRC: EG · VCF MOD AMT: 3 o'clock
* RESONANCE: ~3 o'clock · DECAY: short
* ASSIGN: Clock

- Mother-32 (ASSIGN) t> Mother-32 (GATE) // ping on every clock

patchIdeas.name: Random Krell with VC Mix
patchIdeas.patch: Patch NOISE → MIX 1 · KB → MIX 2 · EG → VC MIX CTRL · VC MIX OUT → VCO 1V/OCT · envelope crossfades between melodic sequence and noise-driven random pitch · sample-and-hold style evolution per note
patchIdeas.diagram:
Mother-32:
* Sequence running · SUSTAIN: OFF · short DECAY

- Mother-32 (NOISE) >> Mother-32 (MIX 1)
- Mother-32 (KB) >> Mother-32 (MIX 2)
- Mother-32 (EG) >> Mother-32 (VC MIX CTRL)
- Mother-32 (VC MIX) p> Mother-32 (VCO 1V/OCT)

patchIdeas.name: Audio-rate filter FM
patchIdeas.patch: VCO SAW → VCF CUTOFF (via VC MIX to attenuate) · RESONANCE 2 o'clock · VCF MODE LP · filter cutoff is FM'd at audio rate · metallic, inharmonic timbres that track pitch · stronger with LIN FM input
patchIdeas.diagram:
Mother-32:
* VCF MODE: LP · RESONANCE: 2 o'clock
* VC MIX: ~10 o'clock

- Mother-32 (VCO SAW) -> Mother-32 (MIX 1)
- Mother-32 (VC MIX) >> Mother-32 (VCF CUTOFF) // audio-rate cutoff FM

patchIdeas.name: External VCO through Moog filter
patchIdeas.patch: Patch any external oscillator → EXT. AUDIO · MIX full CW · turn off VCO MOD · sequence still drives KB and GATE → patch KB to external oscillator 1V/oct · Mother becomes a filter/envelope/sequencer for any eurorack VCO
patchIdeas.diagram:
Mother-32:
* MIX: full CW

- VCO (Out) -> Mother-32 (EXT. AUDIO)
- Mother-32 (KB) p> VCO (V/Oct)
- Mother-32 (GATE) g> VCO (Sync) // optional retrigger

patchIdeas.name: LFO doubles as second VCO
patchIdeas.patch: LFO at audio rate (CV from KB → LFO RATE) · LFO TRI → MIX 2 of VC Mixer · VCO → MIX 1 · VC MIX → EXT. AUDIO · two-oscillator mix tracked by keyboard · LFO now pitches along with VCO
patchIdeas.diagram:
Mother-32:
* LFO RATE: near max · LFO WAVE: TRIANGLE

- Mother-32 (KB) p> Mother-32 (LFO RATE) // LFO tracks pitch
- Mother-32 (VCO SAW) -> Mother-32 (MIX 1)
- Mother-32 (LFO TRI) -> Mother-32 (MIX 2)
- Mother-32 (VC MIX) -> Mother-32 (EXT. AUDIO)

patchIdeas.name: Swing triplets over 16ths
patchIdeas.patch: Set step clock division to 1/16 (SHIFT + KB + STEP + turn TEMPO) · set swing interval to eighth-note triplets (hold STEP, turn GLIDE) · SHIFT + TEMPO to ~66% swing · produces 16th-note pattern with triplet-grid feel — a shuffle not achievable on most analog sequencers
patchIdeas.diagram:
Mother-32:
* Clock division: 1/16 straight
* Swing interval: 1/8 triplet
* Swing amount: ~66%

- Mother-32 (VCA) -> Output (In) // internal sequence
